description: The MaterialAssetMetadata component gives variant info about materials in the form of usable values. These values are usually listed at the bottom of a material inspector but are unusable in that state.

fields.Material: The material to get Metadata on.
fields.VariantIndex: The material variant defined by GPU definitions on the shader. For example, a reflection material has a second variant for having a normal map vs without.
fields.VariantID: The ID of the material variant (can be seen at the bottom of a material in the Inspector too.
fields.WaitingForApply: Whether this material is waiting to be applied in the render scene due to missing variants or otherwise.

usage: Can be used to get variant info and other info shown at the bottom of a material in the Inspector as actual usable values.
